title: Panilla Vlus
description: A Minecraft mod pack aiming to add to the game in a somewhat vanilla-like way. Includes many widely known, and many unknown mods found from the depths of Modrinth.
body:
# Description
A Minecraft mod pack aiming to add to the game in a somewhat vanilla-like way. Includes many widely known, and many unknown mods found from the depths of Modrinth. If you want a vanilla-like experience but don't want a modpack that adds too much random stuff like thirst, temperature, or any RPG-like systems, or any of the many modpacks that just add many popular mods, this one is for you!

## Features:
- Optimization Mods (So you could hopefully run this)
- Inventory Enhancements
- Visual Upgrades
- Better Overworld Generation Including Continents, Stoney Cliffs Are Cool, and Deeper Oceans
- More Utility Blocks and Utility Block Enhancements
- More Utility Block Variants
- More Blocks that are Crafted Using Vanilla Blocks
- Bundles and Armadillo Boxes
- Quality of Life Changes
- Seasons (When the mod decides to not break the game)
- Voice Chat
- Splitscreen
- More Melee Weapons, Bows, Crossbows, a Musket, and a Use For the Fletching Table
- Much More Food, Including Nether Food
- End Generation Overhaul
- Improvements to the Ender Dragon and The Wither
- More Potions
- A Few AI Changes
- Varied Creature Sizes
- More Lively Oceans
- More Creatures
- More Cave Biomes, Better Lush Caves, and Better Cave Generation (especially for aquifers and underground rivers)
- Better Mob Drops
- More Redstone
- More Structures
- Minecart Improvements
- More Late-Game Items
- And Much, Much More!

### FAQ:

Can this be used on multiplayer?:
I haven't tested it, but I am pretty sure you can. I put mods like voice chat in there specifically for this, so I hope so.

Are there bugs?:
Yes, there will be bugs that I have not found yet.

Can I report the bugs?:
You can report any bugs you find on my Github page (I have never used Github before so I hope I set it up right).

Is there a wiki?:
As of now, no. But I'll eventually work on making one.

#### Known Issues:
Serene Seasons causes the server to lag a lot, so just turn it off if it happens.

Sheep Parity resource pack causes sheep's eyes to disappear.

Improved Fletching only works with the Birtch Fletching Table.
